Group1_Success_Index.description: Managerial success indexes for Group 1 (Interaction with Outsiders). These values and those of Group 2 are used to compute the F-test statistic (ratio of sample variances) for testing equality of population variances.

Group2_Success_Index.description: Managerial success indexes for Group 2 (Few Interactions). These values and those of Group 1 are used to compute the F-test statistic (ratio of sample variances) for testing equality of population variances.
